jsonLd.title: Dunzo is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Dunzo family as a E-commerce Executive in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Dunzo:
Dunzo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo!
